claimText: Penn requires all community members (educators, staff, researchers, and students) to be transparent about the use of AI and to disclose when a work product was created wholly or partially using an AI tool.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Be transparent about the use of AI. Disclose when a work product was created wholly or partially using an AI tool and, if appropriate, how AI was used to create the work product.

citation.citationTitle: Statement on Guidance for the University of Pennsylvania Community on Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence
